title: Average Swords
description: Small swords overlay that makes all swords... average sized!
body:
![Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ELFeALIP/images/f0483ee0009a91e577d12820f033df73a3e82724.png)
![Preview Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ELFeALIP/images/b15b522b6b043da761bb5f5146c3fc1fa5369a95.png)

---
# 📜 Description
Average Swords is a Minecraft texture pack which replaces all sword textures with smaller (average) ones.  This is an improvement on the vanilla sword textures as your vision is no longer obscured.

With help from the Average Swords™ texture pack you can compensate for lack of PvP skills with an average-sized weapon... Yes these are average.


# 💾 Installation Guide
You do not need Optifine or Sodium to use this resource pack. Simply download the .zip and drag it into your minecraft texture packs folder: `C:\Users\<USERNAME>\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks`
